title: Owner-scoped project and task CRUD
body:
## Goal
Deliver the authenticated, owner-scoped project and task endpoints — creation, listing, retrieval, partial update, deletion with task cascade, pagination and the done filter — on top of the foundation-and-auth seam.

## Changes
- {"path":"src/router.js","assumption":"refactors-existing"}
- {"path":"src/store.js","assumption":"refactors-existing"}
- {"path":"src/handlers/projects.js","assumption":"creates"}
- {"path":"src/handlers/tasks.js","assumption":"creates"}
- {"path":"test/projects.test.js","assumption":"creates"}
- {"path":"test/tasks.test.js","assumption":"creates"}

## Acceptance
- [ ] Any project or task endpoint called with a missing or invalid bearer token returns 401 with a single-field {error} body (the auth guard runs before route handling).
- [ ] POST /projects with a non-empty name returns 201 and the created project {id, name, ownerId, createdAt}; an empty name returns 400 with a single-field {error} body.
- [ ] GET /projects returns 200 with a JSON array containing only projects owned by the authenticated user and never another user's projects.
- [ ] GET /projects/:id returns 200 with the project when the caller owns it, and 404 both when the id does not exist and when it is owned by another user (existence never revealed — 404, not 403).
- [ ] DELETE /projects/:id returns 204 and removes the project and all its tasks when the caller owns it, and returns 404 for a non-existent or foreign project.
- [ ] POST /projects/:projectId/tasks with a non-empty title returns 201 and the task {id, title, projectId, assigneeId, createdAt, done:false}; an empty title or an assigneeId that is not an existing user id returns 400; a non-existent or foreign project returns 404.
- [ ] GET /projects/:projectId/tasks returns 200 with {items, total, page, pageSize} honoring ?page (default 1), ?pageSize (default 20, capped at 100), and the optional ?done=true|false filter; a non-existent or foreign project returns 404.
- [ ] Non-numeric or out-of-range ?page / ?pageSize values fall back to valid values (page→1, pageSize→20, pageSize capped at 100) rather than returning 400.
- [ ] PATCH /projects/:projectId/tasks/:taskId applies a partial {title?, done?} update and returns 200 with the updated task; a non-existent or foreign project or task returns 404.
- [ ] DELETE /projects/:projectId/tasks/:taskId returns 204; a non-existent or foreign project or task returns 404.

## Verify
- node --test test/projects.test.js (contract)
- node --test test/tasks.test.js (contract)

> 🏷️ Authored with Mandrel v0.0.0 · 2026-07-10
